Footer.termsModalFallback: If the PDF viewer does not display, you can
Footer.unsubscribeText: If you no longer want to be part of the waitlist, unsubscribe

sections.title: 1. NATURE OF REGISTRATION AND NO OBLIGATION
sections.body: Registration in the waitlist (the "Waitlist") for the EQUITTY project (the "Platform") creates only an expectation of rights for the user. Joining the Waitlist does not guarantee account opening, immediate access to services, or a binding contractual offer from the Platform. EQUITTY is an initiative in launch phase; therefore, access will be granted gradually, at the Platform's discretion, and subject to technical availability.

sections.title: 2. CONSENT FOR COMMUNICATIONS
sections.body: By registering, the user grants express, prior, and informed consent to receive electronic communications regarding waitlist status, launch timeline updates, and EQUITTY corporate news. The user may withdraw this consent at any time using the unsubscribe (opt-out) mechanism included in each email.

sections.title: 3. PRIVACY AND DATA PROTECTION
sections.body: EQUITTY is committed to processing the user's personal data under strict confidentiality standards, in accordance with the principles of personal data protection regulations of the Republic of El Salvador. Collected data will be used exclusively to manage platform access and validate user identity. No data transfers to third parties will be made without prior consent, except when legally required by a competent authority.

sections.title: 4. DISCLAIMER OF ADVICE AND RISKS
sections.body: The information provided at this expectation stage is strictly informational and does not constitute financial, legal, tax advice, or an investment recommendation. The user acknowledges that investments carry inherent risks and understands that, before receiving any final product or service, the user must successfully complete legal verification, compliance (KYC/AML), and execution of definitive agreements.

sections.title: 5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
sections.body: All intellectual property rights over content, trademarks, logos, and concepts presented at this stage are the exclusive property of EQUITTY. Joining the Waitlist does not grant any license of use or rights over such assets.

sections.title: 6. MODIFICATION AND TERMINATION
sections.body: EQUITTY reserves the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the Waitlist phase at any time and without prior notice, for technical, commercial, or legal reasons, without generating any right to compensation in favor of registered users.

sections.title: 7. JURISDICTION AND DISPUTE RESOLUTION
sections.body: Any dispute arising from interpretation or compliance with these Terms shall be resolved through Equity Arbitration, in accordance with the Rules of the Mediation and Arbitration Center of the Chamber of Commerce and Industry of El Salvador.

Unsubscribe.title: Leave the waitlist
Unsubscribe.description: Enter the email address you used to register and we will update your status right away.
Unsubscribe.success: You have been removed from the waitlist.
Unsubscribe.error: We could not find that email on the waitlist.

FeatureHighlight.title: Simple, transparent access to real assets
FeatureHighlight.subtitle: Blockchain-backed real-world asset opportunities with transparent pricing and instant settlement.

Toast.welcomeDescription: Start your journey with real world assets.

Benefits.title: A sharper way to enter real-world assets
Benefits.subtitle: The new landing keeps the focus on trust, speed, and access without changing how the product works underneath.

item1.title: Tokenization built for first movers
item1.description: A cleaner front door for investors exploring real-world asset participation.

item2.title: Fast onboarding experience
item2.description: The interface now emphasizes clarity, hierarchy, and quicker decision-making.

item3.title: Structured investor data capture
item3.description: Nationality, email, and referral flow remain intact while the UI becomes more polished.

item4.title: Brand system with stronger recall
item4.description: The visual language is more distinct, more premium, and closer to the reference design.

Testimonials.title: Invest with confidence
Testimonials.subtitle: Make Equitty your complete investment portfolio — one secure platform to manage, grow, and maximize your assets.

HowItWorks.title: The same waitlist flow, presented better
HowItWorks.subtitle: Only the UI changes here. Validation, submission behavior, and referral handling stay connected to the existing implementation.

step1.title: Choose nationality
step1.description: The current country catalog remains connected to the real form and validation schema.

step2.title: Enter your email
step2.description: The submission still goes through the existing server action without altering the backend contract.

step3.title: Add referral if needed
step3.description: Referral validation stays available inside the same form instead of being removed by the redesign.

step4.title: Join the list
step4.description: Success and error dialogs continue to use the current waitlist logic and translated messaging.

FinalCta.title: Ready to take control of your future?
FinalCta.subtitle: Choose Equitty as your unified investment portfolio — secure infrastructure, seamless access, and a platform designed for serious investors.

Faq.title: What changes and what does not
Faq.subtitle: The redesign improves the landing experience while keeping the operational behavior stable.

item1.question: Is the waitlist logic changing?
item1.answer: No. The same server action, validation rules, referral handling, and success or error flows are preserved.

item2.question: Will locale switching still work?
item2.answer: Yes. The new layout still uses the current localized routing and translations for English and Spanish.

item3.question: Did the referral field get removed?
item3.answer: No. It remains in the form and appears when the referred-investor option is enabled.

item4.question: Is this based on the reference design in newDesign/EQ-main?
item4.answer: Yes. The new composition, hierarchy, card treatment, and visual effects were adapted from that design into the real project.
